title: Provider
description: The single global provider destination, recorded in settings.yaml.

name.description: The active provider; its identity is its name.

createdAt.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp stamped by sauron when the document was created; never hand-edited.

lastUpdatedAt.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp stamped by sauron on the document's most recent write; never hand-edited.

lastSyncedAt.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp of the most recent successful sync; written by sync, tolerated absent.

lastSyncAttemptAt.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp of the most recent sync attempt; written by sync, tolerated absent.
